items.title: The Arizona Institute for AI and Society: Materials Home
items.text: The Arizona Institute for AI and Society (AI2S) is driving the University of Arizona as a national leader in responsible AI, Machine Learning, and Data Science. We unify research, support, and campus-wide expertise to solve real-world challenges and propel innovation across disciplines through our services and programs.
